extraction.one_line_summary: PORTE Richie won the time trial, but ROGLIČ Primož retained yellow by 6 seconds over BERNAL Egan after THOMAS Geraint sacrificed GC for teammate.
tactical_patterns: THOMAS Geraint rode domestique duties for BERNAL Egan despite being GC favorite, finishing 25th and surrendering overall contention early
KRUIJSWIJK Steven lost half-minute struggling bike handling in final 50m, revealing TT weakness on technical finish straight
PORTE Richie demonstrated post-injury form recovery with stage win but started 27 seconds down, indicating prior conservative positioning

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: held yellow jersey by only 6 seconds after strong TT, showing early-season GC form durability
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: moved to 2nd overall 6 seconds down with THOMAS sacrificing for him, revealing Sky/Ineos succession plan
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: won stage by 30+ seconds margin after injury struggles, signaling return to elite TT form
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: deliberately rode tempo for BERNAL despite being listed GC favorite, dropped to 25th overall
rider_signals.KRUIJSWIJK Steven: negative: lost 30+ seconds fighting bike handling in final 50m, exposing technical weakness under pressure
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: strong TT performance after poor season start, indicating form turning corner mid-race week
rider_signals.ŠPILAK Simon: positive: set fast early benchmark 15 seconds up on MARTIN, confirming TT strength on home roads
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: neutral: finished 6th place, lost yellow jersey but remained within striking distance
